For multi-page scans, use Capture.

Add vehicle

Edit vehicle

Change status

Not deleted — service history stays intact. The vehicle is hidden from the default fleet view.

Merge vehicles

Move all service history, maintenance schedules, and action items from the current vehicle into another. The current vehicle becomes a hidden merge-audit record.

Apply maintenance template

At least one of mileage or month interval is required.

Export PDF

Attach document to vehicle

Pick an auto-domain document that isn't already linked to a vehicle.
